summary: Phase 10 Feature Testing Complete - All 6 features verified working: Forward to Packaging toggle, Tax Invoice filter, Local Charges removal, Admin edit dispatched orders, Telecaller payment edit, Packaging image upload
seed_data_creation: Created test users: test_telecaller_fwd, test_tc_payment, test_packaging_user for role-based testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 10 features verified working. Backend tests in test_phase10_features.py cover forward-to-packaging toggle, admin edit dispatched orders, telecaller payment edit, packaging update permissions, and local charges removal. Frontend UI tests verified: FWD PKG column in All Orders, invoice filter in Accounts Dashboard (All/Uploaded/Pending), Local Charges removed from Create/Edit/PI forms, Payment edit section in Order Detail, Packaging Update dialog with image upload.

forward_to_packaging.backend: PASS - POST /api/orders/{id}/forward-to-packaging toggles flag, admin only
forward_to_packaging.frontend: PASS - FWD PKG column visible in All Orders, PackageCheck icon buttons work

tax_invoice_filter.frontend: PASS - Invoice filter dropdown with All/Uploaded/Pending options in Accounts Dashboard

local_charges_removed.backend: PASS - No local_charge field in order responses
local_charges_removed.frontend: PASS - Local Charges field removed from Create Order, Edit Order, and PI Builder forms

admin_edit_dispatched.backend: PASS - PUT /api/orders/{id} allows admin full edit on dispatched orders
admin_edit_dispatched.frontend: PASS - Edit button visible, no dispatch lock notice for admin on dispatched orders

telecaller_payment_edit.backend: PASS - PUT /api/orders/{id} allows telecaller to edit payment fields on own dispatched orders
telecaller_payment_edit.frontend: PASS - Edit Payment button in Payment Details section, payment edit form with status/mode/amount/screenshots

packaging_image_upload.backend: PASS - PUT /api/orders/{id}/packaging allows admin to update packaging on dispatched orders
packaging_image_upload.frontend: PASS - Update Packaging dialog with Files/Camera upload for item images, order images, packed box images
